text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while strolling near a park, I see Gold
City in the middle of a photo shoot.

text_block_list.name: Staff A
text_block_list.text:
Okay, let's take ten! City, please make sure to
rest up!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Got it.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
Here, I packed you lunch, so eat up. Tell me if
you're feeling the slightest bit unwell, okay?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah, yeah, I will.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Sigh. She's been such a helicopter manager lately. I ended up relying on her to handle my meals too...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
(This lunch box is massive... Was she just, like,
cooking up a storm between my gigs? Hah, that's
crazy...)

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
(Well, it's not like I can make my own food or
anything... No matter how many cookbooks I go
through, my cooking never gets any better.)

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're that trainer from school... No, it's
nothing big. Just thought it's about time I look
after myself.
choice_data_list:
There's no shame in relying on others for things
you find difficult.

There's no shame in relying on others for things
you find difficult.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that though it takes courage to rely on
others, there's much to be gained in doing so.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
City, are you done eating? How's your stomach
doing?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I'm done, and my stomach's fine. Anyway, I
ate the whole thing. Thanks for making it.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
You sure you're okay? You tend to hold back a
lot... If you have any concerns about your meals, I
can always make some arrangements for you.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
Aside from just making you lunch, I've been
looking into ordering dinner deliveries for you on
shoot days too, so...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: It's okay, you don't need to do all that.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I have been thinking about my meals...
But I'm not, like, stressing over it or anything.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text: So you are worried about your meals! Don't worry, I can handle this—

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: No, listen! It's not like that!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
(Nothing will change if I let her do all the work.
But then again... I'm in no position to fix things by
myself.)

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
(There's much to be gained in relying on others,
huh? Well, if that's true...)

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...The thing is, I want to be able to make my own
meals.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
So instead of cooking for me... Well, I was
wondering if you could teach me how to cook.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text: City...

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I'd be happy to do that. We can hold the
cooking lessons at my house.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During my lunch break, I spot Gold City looking
around for someone to help her out.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Hey, Yukino! Do you have a second?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Munch, munch... Mmm! This's sup'r yummy, City! The sausages are grilled t'perfection!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...That's a relief.
choice_data_list:
Were you able to improve your cooking with
your manager's help?
See, relying on others isn't so bad, is it?
See, relying on others isn't so bad, is it?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...That's a relief.
choice_data_list:
Were you able to improve your cooking with
your manager's help?
See, relying on others isn't so bad, is it?
See, relying on others isn't so bad, is it?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Ah... Yeah, I guess I was. She's given me a few
lessons.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Mm, yeah. Even for my standards, I'd say this
tastes pretty good.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
(It's important to do the best you can in life...
But, I guess it's also important to ask for help
when you need it.)

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah, you might be right about that.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
(I've got to practice more if I'm ever going to
cook my own meals.)

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
This is seriously so yummy! I didn't know city
lunches tasted this good! This brings a tear t'my
eye, it does!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Pfft. Come on, calm down and eat your food.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
(It'd be cool to keep the lessons going. Getting
Yukino's opinion on my cooking every now and
then might be a good idea.)
